scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:go && pnpm build && pnpm pack:packages && pnpm smoke:consumer && pnpm smoke:cloudflare
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm --filter @better-matrix-js/cloudflare publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter better-matrix-js publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @better-matrix-js/chat-adapter publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @better-matrix-js/ai-sdk publish --access public --no-git-checks
